prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young male character named Fang Yichen in traditional Chinese ink painting style, full-body portrait. Extremely attractive with delicate refined features, clear smooth skin, and outstanding temperament. Clean scholarly face with deep penetrating eyes showing intelligence and composure, straight nose, well-defined lips with a calm serene expression. Slender graceful physique reflecting his scholarly nature, wearing a flowing blue-green changshan (traditional Chinese long robe) that drapes elegantly on his lean frame. Long slender fingers visible, embodying his analytical nature. Hair styled in traditional Ming dynasty scholar fashion with a simple topknot. His overall bearing exudes quiet dignity and intellectual depth, befitting a brilliant detective in famine-stricken late Ming China. Traditional Chinese ink wash painting technique with black, white and gray tones, creating profound artistic mood and atmosphere. Full-body character design, pure white background, character centered and standing upright. No text, no symbols, no words. Handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, scholarly elegance., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
